items.title: Live markets: bitcoin retreats under $72,000 as Strategy unloads BTC for first time in four years
items.whyYouShouldCare: Bitcoin's drop below $72,000, coupled with significant selling by Strategy, may impact investor sentiment and liquidity across the crypto market.

items.title: Best Ethereum-based token to turn $300 into $30,000 as ETH targets $5,000
items.whyYouShouldCare: Speculation around Ethereum-based tokens could shift investor focus and capital away from Solana, affecting its ecosystem usage and liquidity.

items.title: Bitcoin ETPs post largest 2026 outflow as crypto funds bleed $1.67B
items.whyYouShouldCare: The $1.67 billion outflow from Bitcoin ETPs signals potential weakness in crypto funds, which could influence overall market dynamics and investor confidence.
